title: Search Status
description: Return index size, crawl queue depth, freshness information, worker health, and storage details for the web search subsystem.

selection.summary: Inspect the health and freshness of the web search index.
selection.whenToUse: Use when you need to understand whether the search index is populated, fresh, or still crawling.
selection.whenNotToUse: Do not use when the task is to retrieve page content or run a search query.
